code:
import string
import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    let n = string.len(trimmed)
    mut i = 0
    mut start = 0
    mut idx = 0
    mut out = ""
    mut first = true
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(trimmed, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9
        if start < i
          if idx % 2 == 0
            let tok = string.substring(trimmed, start, i)
            if first
              out = tok
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{tok}"
            end
          end
          idx = idx + 1
        end
        start = i + 1
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if start < n
      if idx % 2 == 0
        let tok = string.substring(trimmed, start, n)
        if first
          out = tok
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{tok}"
        end
      end
    end
    println(out)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end
